Appearances:

No other appearances.

Discussed (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Ms. Espinosa reported that a substitution of attorney is on file as of 2/26/19 and withdraws her motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

Razelle P. Espinosa of Gilsleider, McMahon, Molinelli & Phan's MOTION to be relieved as counsel.

Off calendar; motion is withdrawn by moving party.
